step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a solid white background. The logo text is navy blue, and only the C has a mint/teal halo ring matching the Grey/Neutral flavour palette. No regulatory or additional text is present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a solid white background. The logo text is navy blue, and only the C has a mint/teal halo ring matching the Grey/Neutral flavour palette. No regulatory or additional text is present.
CONTENT TYPE: logo_only

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center left
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (about 25% of image width)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: #89d0c8 (mint/teal, matches Grey/Neutral secondary light palette)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: #89d0c8
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: solid white background

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold geometric sans-serif (logo only)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, mint/teal, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: used sparingly as accent (halo around C)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image displays the ZONNIC logo in navy blue text, positioned center left on a solid white background. The logo is clean and undistorted, with the C featuring a mint/teal circular halo that matches the Grey/Neutral flavour palette. The halo is properly sized and placed only around the C, with no outline or distortion. The logo has sufficient clear space and uses the correct font style. However, the halo around the C is a solid colour rather than a gradient, which is required for white backgrounds. Additionally, there are no regulatory elements present, such as the bilingual nicotine warning, 18+ icon, or risk communication text. The image follows most brand standards for logo appearance, colour, and layout, but needs minor improvements for the halo and must include mandatory regulatory text and icons for full compliance.

No 18+ age restriction icon is visible in the image.
No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is clearly visible and correctly positioned.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
C halo is present, circular, properly sized, and matches the flavour palette.
Logo is undistorted, not modified, and uses correct arrangement.
Background is solid white, not gradient or image.
No gradient background is present, so gradient rules do not apply.
Logo-only content on white background is acceptable for brand visuals.
All colours used are approved brand colours and match the Grey/Neutral palette.
Logo uses bold geometric sans-serif font, consistent with Santral.
No grey gradient background is used, so these rules do not apply.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it.
Halo does not blend into background, flavour matches, and logo is not placed in any shape.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image.
violations.evidence: No warning text detected anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon is visible in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No age icon detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No risk text detected anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning, 18+ icon, risk text) are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and the 18+ icon and risk text at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory elements detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top.
violations.evidence: No warning text detected in any language.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo is a solid colour instead of a gradient, which is required on white backgrounds.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the C halo to a gradient using both the primary and secondary colours from the Grey/Neutral palette.
violations.evidence: Halo around C is mint/teal (#89d0c8) but not a gradient.
